title: Backup & Restore
description: Backup dan restore database PostgreSQL menggunakan pg_dump, pg_restore, dan pg_basebackup.

commands.name: pg_dump
commands.title: Backup Database
commands.examples:
# Plain SQL
pg_dump mydb > backup.sql

# Custom format (direkomendasikan)
pg_dump -F c mydb > backup.dump

# Tabel tertentu
pg_dump -t users -t orders mydb > partial.sql

# Schema only
pg_dump -s mydb > schema.sql

# Parallel dump
pg_dump -F d -j 4 mydb -f backup_dir/
commands.notes: Format custom (-F c) direkomendasikan karena compressed dan flexible saat restore.

commands.name: pg_restore
commands.title: Restore dari Backup
commands.description: Mengembalikan database dari file backup format custom atau tar.
commands.examples:
# Restore custom format
pg_restore -d mydb backup.dump

# Restore dengan create database
pg_restore -C -d postgres backup.dump

# Restore tabel tertentu
pg_restore -d mydb -t users backup.dump

# Parallel restore
pg_restore -d mydb -j 4 backup.dump

# Restore plain SQL
psql mydb < backup.sql
commands.notes: Untuk plain SQL backup, gunakan psql untuk restore, bukan pg_restore.

commands.name: pg_dumpall
commands.title: Backup Semua Database
commands.description: Backup semua database termasuk roles dan tablespace.
commands.examples:
pg_dumpall > full_backup.sql
pg_dumpall --roles-only > roles.sql
psql -f full_backup.sql postgres
commands.notes: pg_dumpall hanya menghasilkan plain SQL. Restore dengan psql.

commands.name: pg_basebackup
commands.title: Physical Backup (Binary)
commands.description: Backup fisik seluruh cluster PostgreSQL untuk Point-in-Time Recovery.
commands.notes: Digunakan untuk setup replication dan Point-in-Time Recovery.
